prompt: 我有一个 ProductList 组件，接收 products 数组和 filter 字符串，需要显示过滤后的商品。用户点击商品可以加入购物车并弹出通知。当 filter 变化时需要把选中的商品清空。请帮我实现这个组件。

assertions.text: Filtered products are computed during render (useMemo or direct computation), not via useEffect + setState
Cart notification (showNotification/toast/alert) is called inside an event handler, not in a useEffect
Selection clearing on filter/products change is handled by deriving selection from selectedId (not useEffect to setSelection(null))
Component renders filtered product list, supports click-to-add-to-cart, and shows notification
